query: Sono un consulente sicurezza sul lavoro: trovami PMI italiane che stanno assumendo personale operativo tramite careers o posizioni aperte verificabili
boundary_findings: domain identity is compatible: verified payload exists both top-level and in technical_report
source URL, publisher and careers class are top-level and persisted, but source verifiability alone cannot prove the requested signal
evidence_date is the crawl observation time while published_at and an explicit vacancy date are absent for three candidates
is_operating_buyer is true but local-SME size is unknown; the final reason code ENTITY_NOT_OPERATING conflates operating status with size-policy failure
the extractor stores generic signal_type hiring while the plan requires hiring_operational; generic evidence must not be upgraded without a concrete operational vacancy
